title: BOYS & GIRLS CLUB - 211info
text: EAST BEND CLUB BOYS & GIRLS CLUB Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a positive space for youth to engage in fun and empowering programs, such as leadership and community service, after-school programs, academic enrichment, workforce training, performing and visual arts, camps, and personal health. 1707 SE Tempest Drive Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Ages 6-18 Hours: Monday-Friday 1:30pm-6:30pm Summer hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5:30pm Email (541) 385-3009 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 385-3009 Main phone Main phone (541) 385-3009 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: $25 annual membership and $100 monthly fee for after school program. Scholarships available. DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Bend Services: Boys/Girls Clubs Camps Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - HEALTH AND FITNESS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
